title: Cozy Living Room with Warm Earth Tones and Textured Fabrics
description: A cozy living room interior featuring a beige sofa adorned with rust and tan throw pillows and blankets. The room is decorated with a rustic wooden coffee table holding books, a ceramic mug, and a small potted succulent. Behind the sofa, built-in wooden shelves display pottery, framed abstract art, and books. A brick fireplace with a wooden mantel and a round mirror adds warmth to the space. Natural light filters through sheer curtains, highlighting the warm color palette and textured fabrics in a clean, inviting atmosphere.
